contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: Updated OpenCode TUI to use DeepSeek V4 on the workstation. Queried the live https://api.deepseek.com/models endpoint (the older V3 model IDs deepseek-chat / deepseek-reasoner are gone; only deepseek-v4-pro and deepseek-v4-flash are listed now). Edited ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json to register the two V4 model IDs under the DeepSeek provider and set deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro as the default; smoke-tested via opencode run. Flagged a follow-up: truesight_autopilot/app/config.py still defaults DEEPSEEK_MODEL=deepseek-chat which no longer resolves against the live API and will need bumping to deepseek-v4-pro (or v4-flash for the cheap Tier 2 classifier path).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
